data.content: K-18 plan: add age.Resolve(binary, sha256Pin) -> abs path. Wire --age-binary flag and THIMBLE_AGE_BINARY/THIMBLE_AGE_SHA256 env vars from internal/cli/cli.go through to internal/store via store.New options. Add --verbose top-level flag that prints resolved binary once on first use. Update README Requirements to call out the binary as a trust boundary, SECURITY.md to flag residual risk if pinning is not used. Test: TestResolve covers no-pin OK, matching-pin OK, mismatched-pin error, missing-binary error. TODO comment in age.go references K-29 doctor consuming the resolved path.
